statusLine.command: jq -r 'now as $n | .rate_limits.five_hour // {} as $fh | ($fh.resets_at // 0) as $r | ($r - $n | if . < 0 then 0 else . end) as $diff | ($diff / 3600 | floor) as $h | (($diff % 3600) / 60 | floor) as $m | ($diff % 60 | floor) as $s | "[\(.model.display_name)] Context: \(.context_window.used_percentage // 0 | floor)% | Usage: \($fh.used_percentage // 0 | floor)% | Reset: \($h)h \($m)m \($s)s"'
